title: Solomon says new federal AI strategy will track impact on jobs

title: France had no men’s badminton player in the top 10. Then they changed one thing.
description: In 2025, France made a breakthrough in badminton with three male shuttlers in the top 20 and reaching the Thomas Cup final. This transformation was due to the individual coaching model, advanced sports science techniques, and the use of artificial intelligence. The Popov brothers trained at their family-run center while other players trained at INSEP.

title: Centre announces 15,000 scholarships for AI
description: The Centre is launching a major initiative to train young professionals in artificial intelligence. Fifteen thousand scholarships will be offered for the media, entertainment, gaming, and animation sectors. This program aims to boost skills in emerging technologies. Collaborations with IICT, Google, and YouTube will provide specialised training. Participants will gain hands-on experience in AI-enabled creative processes.
